name: onesub
description: One subscription. That's it. AI-native subscription + paywall for mobile apps.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @onesub/shared && npm run build -w @onesub/server && npm run build -w @jeonghwanko/onesub-sdk && npm run build -w @onesub/mcp-server && npm run build -w @onesub/cli
